verse_text: The Lord shall judge the people; Judge me, O Lord, according to my righteousness, And according to the innocence within me.

links.context: The heart is deep beyond all things: St. John Chrysostom labors the point that only God can know men's hearts, citing [[PSA.7:9]]; 1Kg 16:7; C2hr 6:30; and [[MAT.9:3]], [[MAT.9:4]].
